items.headline: Claude Code MCP reliability batch lands
items.body: v2.1.191 ships a cluster of MCP fixes: transient error retries on capability discovery, OAuth token requests that skip browser popups in headless environments, and session-level memory for sandbox network permissions. For ADO MCP, the headless OAuth change removes the most awkward failure mode when running the server unattended. The retries on tools/list are worth having in any MCP server that calls an external API with intermittent availability.

items.source_title: Cloudflare launched self-managed OAuth for all
items.headline: Cloudflare OAuth opens a natural MCP target
items.body: Cloudflare has opened self-managed OAuth to all developers — any app can now get delegated Cloudflare API access without manual onboarding. A Cloudflare MCP server managing Pages deployments, Workers, DNS, and firewall rules through natural language is now buildable without a special partnership. He already runs on Cloudflare and is looking for a second public MCP server; the surface area here is coherent and the tooling is new enough to be interesting.
